question_intent: What is the average number of goals scored by teams in the Campbell Conference that lost to teams in the Wales Conference?

plan.question_intent: What is the average number of goals scored by teams in the Campbell Conference that lost to teams in the Wales Conference?
plan.detail_query:
SELECT t1.year, t1.tmid, t1.name, t1.ga, t2.oppid, t2.w, t2.l, t2.t
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
WHERE t1.confid = 'CC' AND t3.confid = 'WA' AND t2.l = 1

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t1
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
WHERE (t1.confid = 'CC')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
WHERE (t1.confid = 'CC') AND (t3.confid = 'WA')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
WHERE (t1.confid = 'CC') AND (t3.confid = 'WA') AND (t2.l = 1)
LIMIT 5

SELECT t1.year, t1.tmid, t1.name, t1.ga
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
WHERE (t1.confid = 'CC') AND (t3.confid = 'WA') AND (t2.l = 1)

build_logs.notes: Average number of goals scored by teams in the Campbell Conference that lost to teams in the Wales Conference

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t1.year, t1.tmid, t1.name, t1.ga
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
WHERE (t1.confid = 'CC') AND (t3.confid = 'WA') AND (t2.l = 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga)
FROM (SELECT t1.year, t1.tmid, t1.name, t1.ga
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
WHERE (t1.confid = 'CC') AND (t3.confid = 'WA') AND (t2.l = 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC')
GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC')
GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.w, t.l, t.gf, t.ga
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average value of "ga" across all games where a team from the 'CC' conference lost to a team from the 'WA' conference?
